sentences.arabic: يَلْعَبُ بَاسِمٌ كُرَةَ القَدَمِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ كُلَّ جُمُعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Basim igra fudbal sa prijateljima svaki petak.
sentences.translationEn: Basim plays football with his friends every Friday.

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُونَ فِي المَلْعَبِ فِي الرَّابِعَةِ مَسَاءً.
sentences.translation: Skupljaju se na terenu u četiri popodne.
sentences.translationEn: They gather at the field at four in the afternoon.

sentences.translation: Igraju sat vremena, a zatim se odmaraju.
sentences.translationEn: They play for one hour then rest.

sentences.translation: Nakon igre piju vodu i razgovaraju.
sentences.translationEn: After the game they drink water and talk.
